description: Designed for everyday use, this backpack from reebok is perfect for carrying all your stuff in style. The bag comes with enough compartments to hold your essentials and you can even carry it along for a weekend getaway.Height: 17"Width: 13" Made of nylon with complete protective lining for easy cleaning and durability Branded zippers and sliders Big roomy main compartment with seperate zippered pouch to hold essentials Front utility compartment with pouches for easy storage Graphic design on the facade with reebok badge Mesh pockets on the sides for holding a sipper and other essentials Haul loop for easy handling Mesh padding on the back and straps for extra ergonomic comfort and ventillation Adjustable straps for an ergonomic Fit and better support CareHand washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not ironDo not wringDrip dry
